title: ThingsBoard Dashboard
description: JSON Schema for ThingsBoard Dashboard entity, derived from the public ThingsBoard OpenAPI 4.3.

image.description: Thumbnail picture for rendering of the dashboards in a grid view on mobile devices.

mobileHide.description: Hide dashboard from mobile devices. Useful if the dashboard is not designed for small screens.

mobileOrder.description: Order on mobile devices. Useful to adjust sorting of the dashboards for mobile applications

configuration.description: JSON object with main configuration of the dashboard: layouts, widgets, aliases, etc. The JSON structure of the dashboard configuration is quite complex. The easiest way to learn it is to export existing dashboard to JSON.

name.description: Same as title of the dashboard. Read-only field. Update the 'title' to change the 'name' of the dashboard.

id.description: JSON object with the dashboard Id. Specify existing dashboard Id to update the dashboard. Referencing non-existing dashboard id will cause error. Omit this field to create new dashboard.

createdTime.description: Timestamp of the dashboard creation, in milliseconds

tenantId.description: JSON object with Tenant Id. Tenant Id of the dashboard can't be changed.

assignedCustomers.description: List of assigned customers with their info.
